title: esquizo.com
description: esquizo.com is a website dedicated to mental health in general and schizophrenia in particular
body:
A project that originated from the professional website of **Dr. Julià**, a psychiatrist, which has been in existence **since 1997** and was transformed into a **mental health portal** based on **PHPNuke**, modified to establish its own unique identity. Currently, esquizo.com is undergoing a redesign to adapt to new needs (RSS, blogs, etc.).

**esquizo.com is a portal on mental health in general and schizophrenia in particular, specifically aimed at patients and their families. It has a global reach and generates over 7,000 visits daily.**

Hundreds of thousands of people have visited esquizo.com **since its inception in 2000**. Currently, there are about 3,500 users subscribed to our mailing lists, and this number is growing daily. 65% of subscribers are women; 50% of visits and registrations come from Spain, and the other 50% from Latin America and the U.S.

esquizo.com appears at the top of search engine results (Google, Yahoo, Lycos, Altavista, Terra, Alltheweb, MSN, AOL, ...) when searching for terms such as: schizophrenia, mental illness, workplace bullying, disorders, anxiety, psychosomatic conditions, fibromyalgia, etc. The most common topic (50%) is related to schizophrenia, followed by workplace bullying and mental illness in general.

A link to esquizo.com is present on nearly all websites and forums dealing with mental health, including: psiquiatria.com, psiquiatria24x7.com, buscasalud.com, medspain.com, psicoactiva.com, aesm.net, psicologia.cl, guiadeenfermeria.com, elmedico.net, etc.
